mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pfw_transaction_segment ( transaction_segment_id, transaction_global_id, root_transaction_global_id, parent_transaction_global_id, parent_segment_id, transaction_role, module_code, source_module_code, target_module_code, direction, call_depth, sequence_no, api_path, transaction_name, started_at, status, failure_yn, request_header_snapshot_masked, extension_header_snapshot_masked, customer_no_masked, member_no_masked, user_id_masked, operator_id_masked, channel_code, original_channel_code, client_app_id, caller_service, external_institution_code, external_transaction_id, selected_instance_id, attempt_no, retry_yn, failover_yn, circuit_state, downstream_http_status, result_state, unknown_result_id, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{transactionSegmentId}, #{transactionGlobalId}, #{rootTransactionGlobalId}, #{parentTransactionGlobalId}, #{parentSegmentId}, #{transactionRole}, #{moduleCode}, #{sourceModuleCode}, #{targetModuleCode}, #{direction}, #{callDepth}, #{sequenceNo}, #{apiPath}, #{transactionName}, #{startedAt}, #{status}, #{failureYn}, #{requestHeaderSnapshotMasked}, #{extensionHeaderSnapshotMasked}, #{customerNoMasked}, #{memberNoMasked}, #{userIdMasked}, #{operatorIdMasked}, #{channelCode}, #{originalChannelCode}, #{clientAppId}, #{callerService}, #{externalInstitutionCode}, #{externalTransactionId}, #{selectedInstanceId}, #{attemptNo}, #{retryYn}, #{failoverYn}, #{circuitState}, #{downstreamHttpStatus}, #{resultState}, #{unknownResultId}, IFNULL(#{createdBy}, 'PFW'), NOW(6), IFNULL(#{updatedBy}, 'PFW'), NOW(6) ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE transaction_segment_id = VALUES(transaction_segment_id)
mapper.update: UPDATE pfw_transaction_segment SET ended_at = #{endedAt}, duration_ms = #{durationMs}, status = #{status}, failure_yn = #{failureYn}, failure_code = #{failureCode}, failure_message_masked = #{failureMessageMasked}, response_header_snapshot_masked = #{responseHeaderSnapshotMasked}, external_institution_code = #{externalInstitutionCode}, external_transaction_id = #{externalTransactionId}, selected_instance_id = #{selectedInstanceId}, attempt_no = #{attemptNo}, retry_yn = #{retryYn}, failover_yn = #{failoverYn}, circuit_state = #{circuitState}, downstream_http_status = #{downstreamHttpStatus}, result_state = #{resultState}, unknown_result_id = #{unknownResultId}, updated_by = IFNULL(#{updatedBy}, 'PFW'), updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE transaction_segment_id = #{transactionSegmentId}
